one_time_description: Loss on disposal of investments recorded as a one-time expense in 2023
economic_notes: Nation operates real estate limited partnerships (Lake of the Woods LP, Texas Lake Property LP, Tree Lane LP, Union Bar Place LP) and general partner entities. BCFN Gaming revenue of $381,235. Forestry timber rights income of $146,773. Litigation from 16 individuals claiming membership and entitlement to Kinder Morgan (Transmountain) and Seabird Island Specific Claim Settlement benefits.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Consolidated statements include wholly owned subsidiaries and partnerships: Lake of the Woods LP, Texas Lake Property LP, Tree Lane LP, Union Bar Place LP, and multiple general partner entities (1200512 BC Ltd, 12040517 BC Ltd, 1216749 BC Ltd, UBFN Development, UBFN Land). Deferred revenue of $102,000 from prior year fully recognized in 2023. Government temporary loan of $126,100 outstanding. Restricted cash includes $262,867 term deposits held for minor children and $143,986 funds held in trust by Crown. Contingent liability from litigation by 16 individuals claiming Band membership and share of Kinder Morgan/Seabird Island settlement benefits. Loss on disposal of investments of $89,591 is unusual non-recurring item. Health Authority revenue of $60,000 included in total government transfers.
